texto: The freedom we want, for ourselves and for others, is not an absolute metaphysical, abstract freedom which in practice is inevitably translated into the oppression of the weak; but it is real freedom, possible freedom, which is the conscious community of interests, voluntary solidarity.
explicacao: Citação de Errico Malatesta sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The freedom we want, for ourselves and for others, is not an absolute metaphysical, abstract free…” articula reflexao, anarchy, freedom em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como freedom e solidarity.
